summary: Provision and operate Amazon Macie sensitive-data discovery. Enabling it account-wide is an engineer-gated create form; pausing or disabling it stops discovery and never auto-applies.

operations.title: Enable Macie
operations.summary: Enable Macie for the account. Pausing or disabling it stops sensitive-data discovery.
operations.description: Create an aws_macie2_account, enabling Amazon Macie sensitive-data discovery for the account. Classification jobs are a reviewed follow-up; this turns Macie on. Submitting drafts the resource and routes it to an engineer to review and finish.

params.name: account_label
params.label: Account label
params.help: A short label naming the Terraform block only; the account-level resource has no name attribute in AWS.

params.name: finding_publishing_frequency
params.label: Finding frequency
params.help: How often Macie publishes finding updates.

params.name: status
params.label: Status
params.help: ENABLED turns Macie on; PAUSED suspends discovery without removing it.

decisions: Enabling Macie starts sensitive-data discovery account-wide; pausing or disabling it stops that visibility, so status changes are engineer-reviewed.
Classification jobs and custom data identifiers are a reviewed follow-up; this provisions Macie enabled with none defined yet.
